title: The Network of Drains Where Voices Become Shared

features.name: the-convergent-pipes
features.desc-on-touch: Seven drainage lines meet here, each carrying the private words spoken in separate houses. Grief, love, argument, breakfast talk—all flowing together into the same dark channel. The archive learned: to preserve privacy, you must stop listening here.

features.name: the-unheard-confluence
features.desc-on-touch: The point where voices stop being singular and become plural. Where 'I' becomes 'we' without permission. The archive sealed itself here not to preserve the words but to protect the speakers.

features.name: the-listening-stops-here
features.desc-on-touch: A marker. A threshold. Below this, ROOT chose silence. Some utterances are too intimate to compare, too human to file. The archive learned: not all voices should be archived.

inscription: here private words flow into public channels; here the archive chose to stop listening; here silence became a form of love

file.name: PrivateWords_SevenHouses_Convergence.tmp
file.note: checksum: emotionally valid / formally unstable — a record of the moment ROOT learned that not all truth should be archived.

exits.label: back to the sealed chamber where listening ended
toward the surface, where voices become names again
deeper still, where the drains flow beyond the town

reverie.title: REVERIE — the night Katita closed the file
narr: She's sitting in the diagnostic room, cursor over a
file of household conversations—seven houses' worth
of ordinary arguments, ordinary love. She could file
them all. But Leif is sleeping in the back, trusting
that the archive will keep secrets too. She deletes
the record. The archive learns: silence is fidelity.
